texts.title: Genesis 1:1 — opening (Post 7)
texts.pronunciation_confidence: high — attested reading tradition; some phonetic detail debated

line_ipa_derivation.method: lesson IPA per content_concepts_v1; Tiberian scholarly convention from Masoretic niqqud

texts.notes: DAVID Post 7 hook line. Consonants and niqqud attested in Masoretic tradition; distinct from Modern Hebrew revival pronunciation.
